title: campanula bononiensis subsp. obliquifolia
intro: Campanula bononiensis subsp. obliquifolia, also known as Alpine Harebell, is a plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and an antiseptic. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a potential remedy for colds and coughs. Alpine Harebell is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
